JOHN LEE FOR FEB-05-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON MAR-10-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY COURTCALL. ALL DISCOVERY CLOSED. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE.
